macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Near $80K Amid Rally in Major Cryptos Despite Stalled Iran Talks
items.summary: Bitcoin nearly hit $80,000 with a 53% surge in trading volume, while Ethereum topped $2,400 with 84% volume spike; Dogecoin and XRP also gained green amid $213 million in liquidations, mostly shorts.

items.title: Bitcoin Traders Eye $90K Target After DOJ Drops Probe on Fed Chair Powell
items.summary: Bitcoin at $77,638 down 0.5% but poised for $90K push as Kevin Warsh's Fed confirmation odds hit 97% on Polymarket following DOJ probe end; supported by $2.5B ETF inflows in April.

items.title: $242M in Crypto Liquidations Over Past 24 Hours, Shorts Hit Hardest
items.summary: Network-wide liquidations reached $242 million, with shorts at $139 million; Bitcoin saw $78M and Ethereum $86M in liquidations amid volatile trading.

items.title: Bitcoin Slips to $77,800 After Oil Spike, But Analysts See $80K Path
items.summary: Bitcoin down 0.3% to $77,800 post $79K high due to oil surge from Iran tensions; $300M liquidations split evenly, with Cardano and Solana leading altcoin losses.

items.title: Banks Lobby Against CLARITY Act to Block Stablecoin Yields Before Senate Vote
items.summary: Banking groups run ads pressuring US lawmakers to oppose the CLARITY Act, aiming to prevent stablecoin yield introduction ahead of Senate election window.

items.title: Cardano Seeks $46.8M for Bitcoin DeFi Expansion and Vision 2030
items.summary: Cardano's engineering lab proposes $46.8 million budget for Bitcoin DeFi integration and long-term roadmap, pending community approval to tap into Bitcoin's trillion-dollar market.

items.title: Developer Proposes Bitcoin eCash Hard Fork in August 2026
items.summary: Paul Sztorc plans Bitcoin hard fork to eCash at block 964,000, distributing 1:1 to BTC holders and sparking controversy over Satoshi token reallocation.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Cloud Next Unveils Major AI Announcements Including Tensor Chip Split and Vertex AI Refresh
items.summary: Google Cloud Next featured extensive AI developments such as two versions of 8th generation Tensor chips for inference and training, new AI security agents, and a rebranded Vertex AI as Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.

items.title: Anthropic Investigates Unauthorized Access to Powerful Mythos Cybersecurity AI Model
items.summary: Anthropic confirmed investigating claims of improper access to its advanced Mythos AI, which has uncovered thousands of security vulnerabilities; the model is restricted to select partners like Microsoft and AWS for defensive use.

items.title: Banks Worldwide Concerned Over Anthropic's Mythos AI Capabilities for Cyber Exploitation
items.summary: Global banks fear cybercriminals will leverage Anthropic's Mythos AI, which identified severe zero-day vulnerabilities; Anthropic provides access to a defensive coalition but not yet to many international banks.

items.title: 70% of Enterprise AI Usage is Uncontrolled, Fueling Cybersecurity Risks and Costs
items.summary: Lenovo's report reveals over 70% of employees use AI weekly, often without IT oversight, with 61% of IT leaders noting rising AI-linked threats and only 31% confident in mitigation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Officially Revealed
items.summary: Ubisoft has finally unveiled the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake, which is described as looking impressive. The remake is part of Ubisoft's broader lineup of remakes coming before GTA's November launch.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Price Lowered with Other Changes
items.summary: Xbox has announced price reductions for Game Pass along with additional service modifications, as part of recent updates to the subscription offering.

items.title: Diablo 4 Receives Major Update and DLC
items.summary: Diablo 4 has received a significant new update alongside new DLC content, expanding the game's offerings for players.

items.title: Ubisoft Cancels AAA Game
items.summary: Ubisoft has cancelled an unspecified AAA title as part of recent portfolio adjustments.

items.title: Star Wars Eclipse Development Remains Years Away
items.summary: According to Insider Gaming's early April report, Star Wars Eclipse development is progressing very slowly and remains years away from release, despite a significant portion of the game being completed.

items.title: ALGS Split 1 Pro League Day 5 Breaks Four Records
items.summary: Day 5 of the Apex Legends Global Series Split 1 Pro League saw four ALGS records broken in a single match, with Groups A and C from EMEA and the Americas competing for Regional Playoffs places.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: China Blocks Meta's $2 Billion Manus Acquisition
items.summary: Chinese regulators have ordered Meta to unwind its $2 billion acquisition of Manus, determining the deal violated Beijing's investment rules. Manus had relocated to Singapore in 2025.

items.title: Taiwan Court Sentences Ex-Tokyo Electron Engineer for TSMC Data Theft
items.summary: Taiwan's Intellectual Property and Commercial Court sentenced Chen Li-ming, a former Tokyo Electron engineer, to 10 years in prison for stealing TSMC's proprietary data.

items.title: Meta Signs Space Solar Energy Deal with Overview Energy
items.summary: Meta has signed an agreement with Overview Energy to secure 1GW of space-based solar energy for powering AI data centers, with a demonstration planned for 2028.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs to Mainstream
items.summary: Google and Qualcomm are scaling Android to desktops and laptops, aiming to reshape personal computing and challenge Microsoft and Apple's dominance in the PC market.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Silicon-Based Full-Stack Quantum Computer
items.summary: Quantum Motion has achieved a milestone by deploying the first full-stack quantum computer built using standard silicon chip fabrication, potentially accelerating scalable quantum systems.
